titleStmt.title: SII 20.135: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 135. (B.K. No. 50 of 1938-39.) CHIKKALGI, JAMKILANDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the Siddhēśvara temple.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the cyclic year Īśvara, Kārttika, śu. 9, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1157, October 14.

The inscription refers to the joint rule of Bijjaḷa and prince Maiḷugi and records a grant of land to god Mūlasthāna Kalidēva. The donors of the grant were Mādirāja of Chikkalige, Rājamatiyavve and Chaṭṭarasa. The Eṇṭu-Hiṭṭu are also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailō
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.]
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahābhuja
baḷacakravarttiśrī kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīsvaranuṁ kaḷa
turyyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍanuṁ suvarṇnavriṣabhadhvajanuṁ
ḍamarugatūryanirghōṣaṇanuṁ kadanapracaṁḍa
nuṁ paranārīsahōdaranuṁ giridurggamalla gajasāmaṁ
ta saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaranuṁ vairībha kaṁṭhīravanuṁ rā
yasamudhdharaṇanumappa śrīmatu bijjaṇadēva
rasaruṁ maiḷugidēva kumāraruṁ sukhasaṁka
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiḻdu celva ṭhā
ṇiyavappa karbbaḍibīḍeṁballi śrīmanumahā
prabhu . śrī kiṟiya cikaligeya mādirāja
yaṁgaḷuṁ . rājamatiyavvegaḷuṁ . bhū
gauṁḍaruṁ śrī mahāprithviseṭṭiyappa caṭṭarasanuṁ
samasta Eṁṭu hiṭṭuṁ taṁmoḷēkastarāgirddu yi Isva
ra saṁvatsarada kārttika suddha 9 mi sōmavāradaṁdu mū
lasthānada kalidēvarige 24 mattaru keymaṁ 24 kayi nivēśa
neymaṁ 1 mattaru tōṭamaṁ gāṇa kevadasolaga
ge Are vīsa . hēṟige A
Digital edition of SII 20.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
